message:
test: add golden trace corpus tests and fix i18n E2E assertions

- golden_trace_corpus.rs: add comprehensive test suite for golden trace
  validation covering corpus file parsing, trace format compliance, and
  regression detection against recorded terminal output sequences
- i18n_e2e.rs: fix flaky locale detection assertions to handle fallback
  locale resolution correctly on systems without full locale packs
- canvas_adapters.rs: minor adjustment to visual effects canvas adapter
- Update beads issue tracker with latest task closures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
